app_result: Local Streamlit root loaded without OPENAI_API_KEY and displayed the overview.
ranking_result: Ranking view reported 50 filtered countries; the on-demand full table checkbox rendered and exposed the Top 50 CSV download.
country_result: Profile country selector changed from Tanzania to Rwanda and recalculated the displayed contribution total.
sector_result: Sector review opened with Tanzania and public-administration decision-support content.
builder_result: Local RAG generated Proposal, Brief, Evidence Pack, Proposal PDF and Brief PDF download controls.
limitations_result: Evidence view displayed version/reproducibility, limitations, and CPS OCR coverage 663/921 with 258 OCR targets.
